lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਨ ਕਲਾ ਮਾਤ ਗਰਭ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲੰ ਨਹ ਛੇਦੰਤ ਜਠਰ ਰੋਗਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: jen kalaa maat garabh pratipaalan neh chhedant jatthar roganah |
lines.english: His Power provides nourishment in the womb of the mother, and does not let disease strike.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਸਾਂਈ ਗਰਿਸ੍ਟ ਰੂਪੇਣ ਸਿਮਰਣੰ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਜੀਵਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: gusaanee garisatt roopen simaranan sarabatr jeevanah |
lines.english: The Lord of the World is Supremely Beautiful; His Meditation is the Life of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਨ ਕਲਾ ਅਸਥੰਭੰ ਸਰੋਵਰੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਹ ਛਿਜੰਤਿ ਤਰੰਗ ਤੋਯਣਹ ॥੫੩॥
lines.translit: ten kalaa asathanbhan sarovaran naanak neh chhijant tarang toyanah |53|
lines.english: His Power holds back the ocean, O Nanak, and does not allow the waves of water to destroy the land. ||53||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬਧੵੰ ਸੰਤ ਸੰਗੇਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਸ੍ਵਛ ਮਾਰਗ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਣਹ ॥੫੪॥
lines.translit: labadhayan sant sangen naanak svachh maarag har bhagatanah |54|
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, O Nanak, He is found on the path of devotional worship of the Lord. ||54||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਸਕੰ ਭਗਨੰਤ ਸੈਲੰ ਕਰਦਮੰ ਤਰੰਤ ਪਪੀਲਕਹ ॥
lines.translit: masakan bhaganant sailan karadaman tarant papeelakah |
lines.english: The mosquito pierces the stone, the ant crosses the swamp,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਗਰੰ ਲੰਘੰਤਿ ਪਿੰਗੰ ਤਮ ਪਰਗਾਸ ਅੰਧਕਹ ॥
lines.translit: saagaran langhant pingan tam paragaas andhakah |
lines.english: the cripple crosses the ocean, and the blind sees in the darkness,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣਿ ਸਿਮਰੰਤਿ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਸਰਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ॥੫੫॥
lines.translit: saadh sangen simarant gobind saran naanak har har hare |55|
lines.english: meditating on the Lord of the Universe in the Saadh Sangat. Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of the Lord, Har, Har, Haray. ||55||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਧ ਹੀਣੰ ਜਥਾ ਸੂਰਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਧਰਮ ਹੀਣੰ ਤਥਾ ਬੈਸ੍ਨਵਹ ॥੫੬॥
lines.translit: aavadh heenan jathaa sooraa naanak dharam heenan tathaa baisanavah |56|
lines.english: or a warrior without weapons, so is the devotee of God without Dharmic Faith. ||56||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਲਕ ਹੀਣੰ ਜਥਾ ਬਿਪ੍ਰਾ ਅਮਰ ਹੀਣੰ ਜਥਾ ਰਾਜਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: tilak heenan jathaa bipraa amar heenan jathaa raajanah |
lines.english: Like a Brahmin without a sacred mark on his forehead, or a king without the power of command,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸ੍ਚਰਜ ਰੂਪੰ ਰਹੰਤ ਜਨਮੰ ॥
lines.translit: ascharaj roopan rahant janaman |
lines.english: His Form is Wondrous and Amazing. He is beyond incarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਸੰਖੰ ਨ ਚਕ੍ਰੰ ਨ ਗਦਾ ਨ ਸਿਆਮੰ ॥
lines.translit: n sankhan na chakran na gadaa na siaaman |
lines.english: God has no conch-shell, no religious mark, no paraphernalia; he does not have blue skin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੰਤਿ ਸਾਧ ਰਿਦਯੰ ਅਚੁਤ ਬੁਝੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਡਭਾਗੀਅਹ ॥੫੭॥
lines.translit: basant saadh ridayan achut bujhant naanak baddabhaageeah |57|
lines.english: The Imperishable Lord abides in the hearts of the Holy. He is understood, O Nanak, by those who are very fortunate. ||57||

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚ ਮੂਚ ਅਪਾਰ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਹ ॥
lines.translit: aooch mooch apaar gobindah |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe is Lofty and High, Great and Infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੇਤ ਨੇਤ ਕਥੰਤਿ ਬੇਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: net net kathant bedaa |
lines.english: The Vedas say that He is not this, and not that.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦਿਆਨ ਬਸਨੰ ਸੰਸਾਰੰ ਸਨਬੰਧੀ ਸ੍ਵਾਨ ਸਿਆਲ ਖਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: audiaan basanan sansaaran sanabandhee svaan siaal kharah |
lines.english: Living in the world, it is like a wild jungle. One's relatives are like dogs, jackals and donkeys.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਮ ਸਥਾਨ ਮਨ ਮੋਹ ਮਦਿਰੰ ਮਹਾਂ ਅਸਾਧ ਪੰਚ ਤਸਕਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: bikham sathaan man moh madiran mahaan asaadh panch tasakarah |
lines.english: In this difficult place, the mind is intoxicated with the wine of emotional attachment; the five unconquered thieves lurk there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੀਤ ਮੋਹ ਭੈ ਭਰਮ ਭ੍ਰਮਣੰ ਅਹੰ ਫਾਂਸ ਤੀਖੵਣ ਕਠਿਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: heet moh bhai bharam bhramanan ahan faans teekhayan katthinah |
lines.english: The mortals wander lost in love and emotional attachment, fear and doubt; they are caught in the sharp, strong noose of egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਜੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਗੋੁਪਾਲ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਸਰਣ ਉਧਰਣ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ॥੫੮॥
lines.translit: bhaj saadhasang goupaal naanak har charan saran udharan kripaa |58|
lines.english: Vibrate and meditate on the Lord of the World, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; O Nanak, by His Grace, we are saved at the Lotus Feet of the Lord. ||58||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਵਕ ਤੋਅ ਅਸਾਧ ਘੋਰੰ ਅਗਮ ਤੀਰ ਨਹ ਲੰਘਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: paavak toa asaadh ghoran agam teer neh langhanah |
lines.english: The ocean of fire is terrifying and impassable. The distant shore is so far away; it cannot be reached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੰਤ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੋਪਾਲਹ ਸਗਲੵੰ ਰੋਗ ਖੰਡਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: kripaa karant gobind gopaalah sagalayan rog khanddanah |
lines.english: When the Lord of the Universe grants His Grace, all illnesses are cured.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣਿ ਗੁਣ ਰਮਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰਹ ॥੫੯॥
lines.translit: saadh sangen gun ramat naanak saran pooran paramesurah |59|
lines.english: Nanak chants His Glorious Praises in the Saadh Sangat, in the Sanctuary of the Perfect Transcendent Lord God. ||59||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਆਮਲੰ ਮਧੁਰ ਮਾਨੁਖੵੰ ਰਿਦਯੰ ਭੂਮਿ ਵੈਰਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: siaamalan madhur maanukhayan ridayan bhoom vairanah |
lines.english: The mortal is beautiful and speaks sweet words, but in the farm of his heart, he harbors cruel vengeance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਵੰਤਿ ਹੋਵੰਤਿ ਮਿਥਿਆ ਚੇਤਨੰ ਸੰਤ ਸ੍ਵਜਨਹ ॥੬੦॥
lines.translit: nivant hovant mithiaa chetanan sant svajanah |60|
lines.english: He pretends to bow in worship, but he is false. Beware of him, O friendly Saints. ||60||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਚੇਤ ਮੂੜਾ ਨ ਜਾਣੰਤ ਘਟੰਤ ਸਾਸਾ ਨਿਤ ਪ੍ਰਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: achet moorraa na jaanant ghattant saasaa nit prate |
lines.english: The thoughtless fool does not know that each day, his breaths are being used up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਿਜੰਤ ਮਹਾ ਸੁੰਦਰੀ ਕਾਂਇਆ ਕਾਲ ਕੰਨਿਆ ਗ੍ਰਾਸਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: chhijant mahaa sundaree kaaneaa kaal kaniaa graasate |
lines.english: His most beautiful body is wearing away; old age, the daughter of death, has seized it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਚੰਤਿ ਪੁਰਖਹ ਕੁਟੰਬ ਲੀਲਾ ਅਨਿਤ ਆਸਾ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਬਿਨੋਦ ॥
lines.translit: rachant purakhah kuttanb leelaa anit aasaa bikhiaa binod |
lines.english: He is engrossed in family play; placing his hopes in transitory things, he indulges in corrupt pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮੰਤਿ ਭ੍ਰਮੰਤਿ ਬਹੁ ਜਨਮ ਹਾਰਿਓ ਸਰਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮਯਹ ॥੬੧॥
lines.translit: bhramant bhramant bahu janam haario saran naanak karunaa mayah |61|
lines.english: Wandering lost in countless incarnations, he is exhausted. Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of the Embodiment of Mercy. ||61||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਜਿਹਬੇ ਹੇ ਰਸਗੇ ਮਧੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਤੁਯੰ ॥
lines.translit: he jihabe he rasage madhur pria tuyan |
lines.english: O tongue, you love to enjoy the sweet delicacies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤ ਹਤੰ ਪਰਮ ਬਾਦੰ ਅਵਰਤ ਏਥਹ ਸੁਧ ਅਛਰਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: sat hatan param baadan avarat ethah sudh achharanah |
lines.english: You are dead to the Truth, and involved in great disputes. Instead, repeat the holy words:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਦਾਮੋਦਰ ਮਾਧਵੇ ॥੬੨॥
lines.translit: gobind daamodar maadhave |62|
lines.english: Gobind, Daamodar, Maadhav. ||62||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਰਬੰਤਿ ਨਾਰੀ ਮਦੋਨ ਮਤੰ ॥
lines.translit: garabant naaree madon matan |
lines.english: Those who are proud, and intoxicated with the pleasures of sex,

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਵੰਤ ਬਲਾਤ ਕਾਰਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: balavant balaat kaaranah |
lines.english: and asserting their power over others,

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਨਹ ਭਜੰਤ ਤ੍ਰਿਣ ਸਮਾਨਿ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜਨਮਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal neh bhajant trin samaan dhrig janamanah |
lines.english: never contemplate the Lord's Lotus Feet. Their lives are cursed, and as worthless as straw.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਪਪੀਲਕਾ ਗ੍ਰਸਟੇ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਸਿਮਰਣ ਤੁਯੰ ਧਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: he papeelakaa grasatte gobind simaran tuyan dhane |
lines.english: You are as tiny and insignificant as an ant, but you shall become great, by the Wealth of the Lord's Meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਣੰ ਤ ਮੇਰੰ ਸਹਕੰ ਤ ਹਰੀਅੰ ॥
lines.translit: trinan ta meran sahakan ta hareean |
lines.english: The blade of grass becomes a mountain, and the barren land becomes green.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਨਿਕ ਬਾਰ ਨਮੋ ਨਮਹ ॥੬੩॥
lines.translit: naanak anik baar namo namah |63|
lines.english: Nanak bows in humble worship, countless times, over and over again. ||63||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਦਯਾਰੰ ॥੬੪॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak har gur dayaaran |64|
lines.english: prays Nanak, when the Guru, the Lord, becomes Merciful. ||64||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੂਡੰ ਤ ਤਰੀਅੰ ਊਣੰ ਤ ਭਰੀਅੰ ॥
lines.translit: booddan ta tareean aoonan ta bhareean |
lines.english: The drowning one swims across, and the empty is filled to overflowing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧਕਾਰ ਕੋਟਿ ਸੂਰ ਉਜਾਰੰ ॥
lines.translit: andhakaar kott soor ujaaran |
lines.english: Millions of suns illuminate the darkness,
